claim_scope: Exact Kalmanson quotient-cone certificates for the 16 vertex-circle-clean fixed-order selected-row assignments recorded by the reversed-second-block shuffle negative-control packet. Each certificate applies only to its encoded selected-row assignment and encoded cyclic order. This is not all-order closure, not a fragile-bridge proof, not a proof of Erdos Problem #97, and not a counterexample.
interpretation: The reversed-second-block vertex-circle negative-control packet left 16 fixed-order abstract selected-row assignments clean under that gate. This artifact replays exact Kalmanson quotient-cone certificates for those same 16 assignment/order pairs, closing that bounded escape set only.
